command: molecule-ranker discover --disease "Synthetic V3 integration planning condition" --mode dry_run --enable-integrations --output-dir "$OUTPUT_DIR" --json
what_output_does_not_prove: No external-system write, synchronization success, clinical validity, or biomedical outcome is proven.
No protocol, synthesis instruction, or dosing guidance is provided.
what_output_means: Integration-aware planning can run without external writes.
External writes require human approval and write_approved_live mode.
